title: Enchanted Book Hats - B'BB X Bare Bones
description: Make librarians use the right book on their heads
body:
![Animated Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65ffe7f397dad046cc0660ed610a91486603c4bd.gif)

Since I realized that librarians have books on their heads, I had the idea of ​​making the book match with each enchantment book and for this part, I came across the unique [Better, Fresher 3D Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bray-cyber-3d-enchanted-books) pack, which their creators kindly allowed me to borrow their amazing models to create these skins.

You can unlock the skins by using a nametag with the enchantment book's name, like in this example:

**"Mr. Mending"** or **"Mending God"**. As long you uses the enchantment name in there, you can add more before or after without worrying about case. And with this other renames, you can unlock the usual books as well.

![Other Renames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0012010a5c1a4d5221efc6c14b023a1450367cc6.png)

## Vanilla version

This is the Bare Bones version of the pack, you can get the vanilla version [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchanted-book-hats).

## Highly recommended

Although the packs [Better, Fresher 3D Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bray-cyber-3d-enchanted-books) OR [Bray's Better Books!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brays-better-books) don't have a Bare Bone version yet, I sugest you also use one of them to see the same books texture on your hand and your UI and have a more immersive experience.

## Requirements

This resource pack requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) OR [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) mods to work.

## Talk to me

Contact me on my discord (seiyadipessego) if you have any problem with it.
